title: 2026-03-24 10.05 Curtis Staff Meeting
notes:
### Taylor Hammond Role Transition Discussion

- DevSecOps manager (3 months) expressing interest in joining Eric’s AI team
- Currently manages 4-person DevSecOps team for exchange deployments
- Key responsibilities under Arshad:

- AWS remediation effort coordination
- Exchange Linux instance upgrades
- GitHub migration from Bamboo coordination
- Only person besides contractor Patrick who knows XDP systems
- Arshad frustrated with timing - hired Taylor 3 months ago as manager, now wants to leave

- Built onboarding around COE vision and platform engineering plans
- Feels Taylor approached transition negatively

### Current DevSecOps Operations

- Team handles all exchange deployments via Bamboo (not migrated to GitHub)

- 3 consultants from Happiest Minds + 1 full-time employee
- Trying to fill 2 more GHX positions + 1 principal engineer
- Manual processes dominate due to monolithic architecture
- Aaron (new hire) has DevOps background, could potentially take over some responsibilities
- Daniel confident deployments will continue without Taylor - main concern is infrastructure projects like golden AMI upgrades

### Agreed Resource Split

- 30% Taylor’s time stays with infrastructure team (Arshad)

- Complete hiring of 2 DevSecOps positions
- AWS remediation findings coordination (2 status calls/week)
- Support deployment operations
- 70% Taylor’s time moves to AI team (Eric)
- Decision pending Taylor’s agreement to arrangement

### Tech Debt Registry & Search Funding Initiative

- Deadline: End of Thursday for priority submissions
- Purpose: Support April 23rd board meeting funding request to Veritas
- Each team needs 3-5 priority areas requiring funding acceleration
- Current maintenance burden: 60-70% of engineering budget
- Goal: Reduce to 20-25% by end of year to enable growth focus
- Teams responsible:

- Balaji: Marketplace priorities (coordinating with Jake on mobile app modernization)
- Daniel/Ramesh: Exchange perspective rollup to Martin
- Seth: Value analysis (3 areas identified)
- Arshad: Infrastructure already completed multiple iterations

### Headcount Spreadsheet Updates

- Laura requesting updates for investor reporting
- Status by team:

- Infrastructure (Arshad): Complete
- Value Analysis: Complete
- Marketplace (Eric): Missing 3 people (Sean, Dirk, Brandon) - resolved, found on infrastructure tab
- Automation (Daniel): Needs access to correct spreadsheet
- Wilson’s budget placement TBD under shared services

### City Map Review Process

- Curtis scheduling individual one-on-ones this week
- Will review team submissions individually rather than group discussion

### Platform Engineering Vision

- Arshad building centralized COE across all 9-10 parts
- Standardized DevOps processes and automation goals
- Aaron to connect with Taylor and Arshad post-vacation for knowledge transfer
- Potential AI assistance for lower-priority tech debt items not receiving search funding

### Next Steps

- Arshad: Discuss 30/70 split arrangement with Taylor
- Aaron: Meet with Taylor and Arshad for DevOps transition planning
- All teams: Submit 3-5 priority tech debt areas by Thursday
- Curtis: Individual city map reviews in scheduled one-on-ones
- Daniel: Get access to correct headcount spreadsheet via Slack

Chat with meeting transcript: https://notes.granola.ai/t/17842430-6a08-4d55-b997-3afb6c64a6f3
